title: MemoryRecord
description: Knowledge with provenance. final.md section 12.6. Memory has a source and an access policy, can be invalidated, and derived memory can be rebuilt from the source event.

source_event_id.description: Journal event this memory was projected from. Answers 'why do you know this?'.

content_ref.description: Content-addressed reference to the memory body (not the body inline), so it can be redacted.

expiry.description: When this memory must be forgotten, or null for no scheduled expiry.

access_policy.description: Named policy governing who/what may read this memory.
